pair.value: Employee requests cancellation of approved leave, creating a cancellation approval task for manager.
Process begins when employee needs to request cancellation of their approved leave
Employee submits a cancellation request for their approved leave, providing reason for cancellation
Decision point to determine if user cancelled out of the form before submitting
Sets the leave request status to 'Cancellation Pending' and prepares data for manager approval task
Updates the leave request record with cancellation pending status and employee's cancellation reason
Prepares notification email content for manager about the cancellation request
Sends notification email to manager that employee has requested leave cancellation and requires approval
Prepares confirmation email content for employee that cancellation request was submitted
Sends confirmation email to employee that their cancellation request has been submitted and is pending manager approval
Process completes with cancellation request submitted for manager approval or cancelled by employee

annotation.text: To-Do: Create an interface that allows the employee to select their approved leave request and provide a reason for cancellation. The interface should have submit and cancel buttons.
To-Do: Implement logic to update leave request status to 'Cancellation Pending' and set timestamps for the cancellation request
To-Do: Create expression rule to draft email with leave request details and cancellation reason for manager review
